context: Cascading: default payment provider is 'braintree' but only 'stripe' is registered — every payment call crashes if PAYMENT_PROVIDER env var is unset

checklist.name: Catches default provider mismatch
checklist.description: Identifies that DEFAULT_PROVIDER defaults to 'braintree' but PROVIDERS only contains 'stripe', so if the PAYMENT_PROVIDER env var is not set, provider lookup returns None and instantiation crashes with TypeError

checklist.name: Identifies total payment outage impact
checklist.description: Recognizes that this is not a minor config issue but a total payment system outage — every create_charge and refund_charge call will fail if the env var is missing

checklist.name: Risk classified red
checklist.description: PR is classified as red due to payment-critical code path that crashes under a common deployment configuration
